scripts.compact: compact compile src/zk-stables.compact src/managed/zk-stables && compact compile src/zk-stables-registry.compact src/managed/zk-stables-registry && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs src/managed/zk-stables src/managed/zk-stables-registry
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && cp -R src/managed dist/managed && cp src/*.compact dist/ && node scripts/strip-managed-sourcemaps.mjs dist/managed/zk-stables dist/managed/zk-stables-registry
